info.title: Aruba.StorageProvider.Api

full.description: Uri of the Full backup in the chain.

previous.description: Uri of the previous backup in the chain (null if Full).

next.description: Uri of the next incremental backup in the chain (null if last).

BackupPlatformSize.description: Platform event containing the backup size reported by the platform.

size.description: Backup size in megabytes (mebibytes MiB) reported by the platform.

sourceVolume.description: The source volume for this backup
The source volume for this backup

billingPeriod.description: The billing period for blockStorage. Only Hour is a valid value

bootable.description: True if the original volume of the snapshot was a bootable disk

compoundResource.description: The resource used by the volume at the time the snapshot was created
